/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/space-invaders.dir/main.cpp.o" -o space-invaders  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/sdl3_image/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/sdl3/lib ../lib/libgraphics-module.a ../lib/libgame-mechanics.a /opt/homebrew/opt/sdl3_image/lib/libSDL3_image.0.4.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/sdl3/lib/libSDL3.0.dylib
